notes: Base uses the cleaned GLB format folder.
Sci-Fi Essentials remains glTF to preserve shared texture dependencies without bloating files.
Trees use converted GLB files with red/pink material treatment for the current Sahib AI map direction.
Ignored duplicate or source-only formats such as FBX and OBJ after cleanup.

packs.name: Base
packs.notes: Use these GLB pieces for base rooms, corridors, gates, stairs, walls, and floor architecture.

packs.name: Sci-Fi Essentials Kit[Standard]
packs.notes: Kept as glTF because the pack shares texture files; bulk GLB conversion duplicates texture payload heavily.

packs.name: Tress
packs.notes: Use only the red/pink tree set for the surreal alien environment. The GLBs were converted from FBX and material-tinted for runtime use.
